text: Hello, everyone! This is Bianca here on your channel with super easy and super fun home decorating ideas.
Tune in for last week's winner and today's prize!
But today, we want to thank you on your interest in our last bedroom makeover video!
So thank you! Thank you.
Yes, thank you, thank you, thank you.
And because of that, we are presenting you with new ideas on how to style your bedroom!
Let's get started.
[Bedroom Makeover.]
As you can see, we have a sturdy double-size bed.
The bed frame looks traditional because it is solid wood, which I think is really good for white clean walls.
Using wood furniture against a white wall or paint is always a pretty match.
What makes the bed frame modern is its minimalistic design.
It has a simple look, but once you check its material, it's sturdy wood.
We will place a Mandaue Foam Mattress on top.
This Flex Foam Mattress has the perfect thickness for the bed foam.
It is sturdy and very comfortable.
Great, isn't it?
Then, the bedding!
I chose white bedsheets to match our overall design.
The bedding we can buy from Mandaue Foam come in a bag, which is very convenient.
But, I want to accent it with a duvet and a green fleece.
It is already getting cold in the country as the Christmas season approaches.
So, the duvet will give extra warmth on the bed.
A night stand looks perfect on this side.
Night stands can become the accents for the room.
They also serve as storage for the stuff I want to keep near me.
When there is a nightstand, I can put a lamp on it, and that's additional lighting for the room.
To enhance the look of the room, I am placing a wall shelf above the bed headboard and decorating it with frames.
I want to play with the sizes, colors and shapes of the frames to break the monotony of the overall color of the room.
Lastly, I want a chest of drawers here by the window.
Just look at the design of the drawers, I so love it!
So, I'm adding it to the room to accentuate its look and to give more storage space for personal possessions.
Let's add some decor on top too.
Tada! Here's a new look of this bedroom.
What do you guys think?
You have other comments or suggestions about bedroom makeovers?
Well, share your thoughts below.
Thank you so much for watching and until next time!
Of course, don't forget to subscribe!
